disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep throbbing pain localised to a lower right back tooth, worse on biting and touching the tooth
trigger_question_examples: Is one particular tooth sore when you bite or touch it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a lower right back tooth — it's been pounding for two days and it kills when I bite down or touch it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapidly progressive swelling of the cheek and jaw over the last 12 hours
trigger_question_examples: Has your face started to swell?
How quickly has the swelling come on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My cheek has ballooned up on the right side just in the last half day — it's getting bigger fast.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reduced mouth opening — can only open about two centimetres
trigger_question_examples: Can you open your mouth normally?
How wide can you open your mouth right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can barely open my mouth — maybe two centimetres before it seizes up and hurts.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels hot and shivery / systemically unwell
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt feverish, hot or shivery?
Do you feel generally unwell in yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I've been feeling hot and shivery and just wiped out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Currently able to swallow saliva, voice sounds normal and breathing is not noisy or restricted (airway screen)
trigger_question_examples: Can you still swallow your own saliva easily?
Is your voice muffled, or is your breathing noisy or hard at all?
Does it feel like anything is pushing up under your tongue?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I can still swallow OK and my voice sounds normal — my breathing's fine, it's really just the pain and the swelling on my cheek.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bad taste and pus weeping from the gum beside the sore tooth
trigger_question_examples: Is there any bad taste, or any discharge from the gum?
Can you see or taste any pus around the tooth?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a foul taste and I can see some yellow gunk coming from the gum next to the tooth.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has been taking more over-the-counter ibuprofen and paracetamol than the packet allows to control the pain
trigger_question_examples: What have you taken for the pain, and how much?
Have you been sticking to the doses on the packet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I've been taking a lot more ibuprofen and paracetamol than it says, because nothing was touching the pain.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I didn't think a bit extra would matter — I was desperate.
